description:
**Milestone:** Failure Triage & Constraint Engineering

Connect the existing but unused FailureCategory/FailureAnalysis types from libs/types/src/failure.ts to the EscalateProcessor in lead-engineer-service.ts. Create a small FailureClassifierService that pattern-matches escalation reason strings to structured categories and recovery strategies. Store the FailureAnalysis result on the escalation event and in the feature's blocked metadata so humans reviewing escalations can see a structured root-cause classification rather than a free-text string.

The failure.ts types are fully defined: FailureCategory enum (transient, rate_limit, quota, validation, tool_error, test_failure, merge_conflict, dependency, authentication, unknown), RecoveryStrategy union, and FailureAnalysis interface (category, isRetryable, suggestedDelay, maxRetries, recoveryStrategy, explanation). The classifyError() utility in @automaker/utils already exists. This phase is purely about connecting them.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/failure-classifier-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/lead-engineer-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EscalateProcessor calls failure classifier and attaches FailureAnalysis to escalation event
- [ ] All 9+ escalation reason strings map to a non-unknown FailureCategory
- [ ] Escalation events include structured recovery strategy
- [ ] npm run build:server passes
- [ ] npm run test:server passes

**Complexity:** small
